title: Set-Based Data Analysis
description: Use Python sets for real-world data analysis tasks. Extract unique words from text, find common interests between people, identify exclusive items between groups, and remove duplicates while preserving order.
starterCode:
def unique_words(text):
    """Extract all unique words from text as a set.

    Splits text on whitespace and converts all words to lowercase.

    Args:
        text: A string of text to analyze.

    Returns:
        A set of unique lowercase words. Empty set for empty string.
    """
    pass


def common_interests(person_a_interests, person_b_interests):
    """Find shared interests between two people.

    Args:
        person_a_interests: An iterable of person A's interests.
        person_b_interests: An iterable of person B's interests.

    Returns:
        A set of interests shared by both people.
    """
    pass


def find_exclusive(group_a, group_b):
    """Find items exclusive to each group.

    Args:
        group_a: An iterable of items in group A.
        group_b: An iterable of items in group B.

    Returns:
        A tuple of two sets: (only_in_a, only_in_b).
    """
    pass


def deduplicate_preserving_order(items):
    """Remove duplicates from a list while preserving original order.

    The first occurrence of each item is kept.

    Args:
        items: A list that may contain duplicate values.

    Returns:
        A new list with duplicates removed, order preserved.
    """
    pass
hints: Use str.lower().split() to break text into lowercase words, then convert to a set for uniqueness.
Set intersection (&) finds common elements; set difference (-) finds exclusive elements.
To deduplicate while preserving order, track seen items in a set and only append unseen items to the result list.

testCases.validation: assert unique_words('Hello hello World') == {'hello', 'world'} and unique_words('a b c a') == {'a', 'b', 'c'}

testCases.description: find_exclusive identifies items unique to each group
deduplicate_preserving_order removes duplicates and keeps order
unique_words handles empty and whitespace-only input
testCases.validation: assert unique_words('') == set() and unique_words('   ') == set()

testCases.description: find_exclusive handles disjoint and identical sets
